content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — App is login-gated (`App/LoginView.swift` uses SecureField/Sign In) but demo credentials and notes are placeholders: `demo_user.txt`="test", `demo_password.txt`="changeme", `notes.txt`="TBD".
Pierre: Apple's reviewers cannot get past the sign-in screen with placeholder credentials like "test"/"changeme", and "TBD" notes give no guidance on reaching core features — this typically results in an immediate 2.1 rejection for missing/invalid demo access. Replace these with a real working demo account and write notes describing exact steps to reach gated content before submitting.
